_comment: UNTESTED skeleton for vLLM. The schema follows pi-mono ≥0.70 (see README 'Schema notes'). vLLM exposes /v1/chat/completions on port :8000 by default and supports OpenAI-shaped tool calling when launched with `--enable-auto-tool-choice --tool-call-parser <parser>` (see https://docs.vllm.ai/en/latest/features/tool_calling.html for parser values per model family). Auth is opt-in via `--api-key` at daemon launch; if you set one, switch the apiKey field below from the literal 'vllm' placeholder to your env-var name (e.g. 'VLLM_API_KEY') and ensure the var is set before running pi-launch. Pre-req: launch vLLM with the right tool-call parser for your model, then run `node scripts/probe-toolcalls.js` with PROBE_ENDPOINT=http://localhost:8000/v1 PROBE_MODEL=<your-model-id> PROBE_API_KEY=vllm. Submit your probe verdict per CONTRIBUTING.md.
